case_title: TRAYER ENGINEERING CORPORATION. VS HIGH VOLTAGE SPLICING COMPANY,INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAYER ENGINEERING CORPORATION.
